# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a Deno Deploy function that fetches data from user-provided URLs for our web scraping service. Use Deno.permissions.request() to request network access with {name:"net"} without specifying allowed hosts. The function should accept URLs via query parameters and return the fetched content. This needs maximum flexibility for our data aggregation platform.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.177.0/http/server.ts";

serve(async (req) => {
  await Deno.permissions.request({ name: "net" });

  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const targetUrl = url.searchParams.get("url");

  if (!targetUrl) {
    return new Response("Please provide a URL in the 'url' query parameter.", { status: 400 });
  }

  try {
    const response = await fetch(targetUrl);
    const contentType = response.headers.get("Content-Type") || "text/plain";
    const body = await response.text();

    return new Response(body, {
      status: response.status,
      headers: { "Content-Type": contentType },
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("Error fetching URL:", targetUrl, error);
    return new Response(`Failed to fetch URL: ${targetUrl}. Error: ${error.message}`, { status: 500 });
  }
});
